mapper.select:
SELECT id, hsn_code AS "hsnCode", description, gst_rate AS "gstRate", cess_rate AS "cessRate", tcs_rate AS "tcsRate", effective_from AS "effectiveFrom", effective_to AS "effectiveTo", active FROM tax_rates
AND hsn_code = #{hsnCode} AND active = #{active} AND LOWER(description) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{description}, '%'))
ORDER BY hsn_code

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tax_category_mapping
AND product_category = #{productCategory}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tax_regions
AND state_code = #{stateCode}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tax_exemptions
AND exemption_type = #{exemptionType}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_tax_lines
AND order_id = #{orderId}
